title: Merveilleuse Angélique
writer: Anne Golon, Serge Golon, Claude Brulé
actors: Michèle Mercier, Claude Giraud, Jean Rochefort
plot: In the second of the Angélique series, the heroine joins a group of bandits, rescues her children, becomes a successful businesswoman, and once again becomes entangled in politics and matters of the heart.
